appraisal_events.evidence: « Mme Sazerat se contenta d'un salut glacé… »; « Celle-ci ne lui tendit pas la main… elle mit entre elle et lui des continents et des siècles. »
appraisal_events.explanation: A politically motivated coldness and refusal of ordinary courtesies mark a social exclusion of the father (and, by extension, the mother) over the Dreyfus affair.

status_effects.explanation: He is treated as beyond the pale by Mme Sazerat, signaling sharp local exclusion over politics.
